shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -80 && printf '\\n--- direction references ---\\n' && rg -n \"getComputedStyle|direction|rtl|RightToLeft|isRtl\" . -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!dist'"' | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx && printf '\\n--- RTL context ---\\n' && sed -n '1,160p' src/contexts/RTLContext.tsx && printf '\\n--- root exports/usage ---\\n' && rg -n \"LightboxRoot|RTLProvider|useRTL\" src test/unit -g '"'!node_modules'"'"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' test/unit/RTL.spec.ts && printf '\\n--- package scripts ---\\n' && node -e \"const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(JSON.stringify(p.scripts,null,2))\""
/bin/bash -lc "cat package.json && printf '\\n--- test setup ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' test/unit/setup.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && cat tsconfig.json"
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && nl -ba src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx | sed -n '12,42p' && nl -ba test/unit/RTL.spec.ts | sed -n '140,178p'"
